title: Project Understanding Skill Config
description: Configuration for the project-understanding workflow skill.

depth.description: Analysis depth: fast (routes and modules only), normal (routes, modules, flows, features), deep (all plus call graphs, impact analysis, risk assessment).

allow_source_fallback.description: When true, allow reading source files for context when CodeMap facts are incomplete. Still requires CodeMap to be available.

max_modules.description: Maximum number of modules to include in analysis.
